reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong pass. The sprite radiates warm Hyrule charm — saturated pinks, leafy greens, sky-blue wing accents. Round friendly silhouette reads as a benevolent summon/fairy companion, never threatening. Flower crown + pink dress perfectly evoke toy-diorama Zelda mood. Score ~8.5/10 emotional. Technical axis (40%): Solid pass. 1px hard outlines visible and consistent at all zoom levels, no anti-aliasing bleed. Hard shading uses 2-3 tones on dress and face; pixel grid appears snapped throughout. Hand-pixeled texture feels deliberate. Minor issue: wings use only 2 tones (white + blue outline) with minimal interior shading — slightly flat compared to Denzi peer reference wing treatments, but not a failure. Score ~7.5/10 technical. Weighted: 0.6×8.5 + 0.4×7.5 = 5.1 + 3.0 = 8.1 → 8. Verdict: pass.
